name: obsidian-cli
description: Bundle Obsidian CLI skills that teach the agent to operate Obsidian vaults through the official obsidian command-line tool.

interface.shortDescription: Use Obsidian vaults through the official CLI
interface.longDescription: A skill-only plugin that teaches the agent to use the official Obsidian CLI for vault inspection, note reading and writing, search, tasks, properties, and plugin development diagnostics. It does not bundle an MCP server and does not store Obsidian credentials.
defaultPrompt: Search my Obsidian vault for notes about a project
Append a task to today's Obsidian daily note
Use Obsidian CLI to reload the plugin I am developing
